title: Section 7D
content: 1[7D Tribunal--The Industrial Tribunal constituted by the Central Government under sub-section (1) of section 7A of the Industrial Disputes Act, 1947 shall, on and from the commencement of Part XIV of Chapter VI of the Finance Act, 2017, be the Tribunal for the purposes of this Act and the said Tribunal shall exercise the jurisdiction, powers and authority conferred on it by or under this Act.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 7 of 2017, s. 159, for section 7D (w.e.f. 26-5-2017).
